title: Marathon Digital Q3 2025: 92% revenue growth amid strategic AI expansion
text: Marathon Digital Q3 2025 earnings with 92% revenue growth. Revenue climbed 92% year over year to $252.4 million. The company swung from a $124.8 million loss a year ago to $123.1 million in net income. EPS was $0.27 versus an estimate of $0.45. Adjusted EBITDA reached $395.6 million versus $22.3 million in Q3 2024, up 1,674%. The company mined 2,144 Bitcoin during Q3, with average Bitcoin price increased 88%, contributing $113.3 million to revenue. Bitcoin holdings surged 98% to 52,850 BTC compared to 26,747 at the end of Q3 2024. Energized hash rate increased 64% from 36.9 to 60.4 exahash per second. The company is expanding into AI infrastructure with new inference rack deployments. MARA is framing itself as a vertically integrated digital energy and infrastructure company.
